items.reason: The new design spec in the diff describes the new dscli logs syntax, default tail length, local read-only scope, registration, and test intent.
The new implementation plan in the diff tracks the command file, registration, tests, and verification for dscli logs.
This operator-facing dscli command reference lists the available subcommands and their options, but the PR did not add dscli logs or its -w/-n arguments.
